programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 56
programme.desc: Sunday night's winner cooks off against world renowned Belgian chef, Emmanuel Stroobant, famous for his Saint Pierre restaurant in Singapore.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 57
programme.desc: In one of the most ambitious off site challenges, the contestants board HMAS Kanimbla for a task that is going to require a full team of them to succeed. They will be cooking lunch for 200 hungry sailors, using produce from the ships pantry.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 58
programme.desc: Tonight the bottom two performers from the Navy Challenge face off in a taste test. The loser will be eliminated. On the menu, Georges mums traditional Greek Moussaka.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 59
programme.desc: Tonight, Gary and George work their magic on lamb shanks, beef kofta, double backed cheese soufflÃ© and crepe suzette.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 60
programme.desc: In the mystery box challenge, contestants have to make their own sausages. There's chaos in the kitchen as they get to grips with turning a slab of meat into their own snag. None have used a sausage maker before, and it's not as easy as it looks.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 61
programme.desc: The two bottom from last nights Invention Challenge face a Pressure Test. On the menu, perhaps the most complex and difficult dish so far; a pannacotta with macaroons, ganache and a passionfruit slick.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 62
programme.desc: Celebrity chef Adrian Richardson, from Melbourne's La Luna restaurant goes up against the MasterChef winning contestant tonight.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 63
programme.desc: The contestants have $100 to buy ingredients and then race against the clock to create a dish that they hope will impress the panel, consisting of some of the founders of Australian cuisine.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 64
programme.desc: Today, the bottom two performers compete for their lives as they engage in the sudden death Taste Test. One wrong guess and they're going home. Tonight, the dish is Gary's Sri Lankan Curry.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 65
programme.desc: Gary and George take the competitors through the Friday night cooking lesson. On the menu this week: sausages with red wine reduction; Greek style baked beans; roast salmon and pancetta; and chocolate and nut cigars.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 66
programme.desc: Just six contestants have made it to the final week. From 7500 people who originally auditioned, one of these six will become Australia's first MasterChef. In the first of the week's high pressured challenges, the contestants must cook on a budget of $10.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 67
programme.desc: A host of Australia's most renowned chefs join the MasterChef team to help select the most worthy contestant for the title. Acclaimed Sydney chef Luke Mangan is a guest judge on tonight's show as the week's eliminations begin.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 68
programme.desc: Matt Moran returns to MasterChef Australia as the five remaining contestants enter the first invention test of the week. Along with the MasterChef judges, Matt has the responsibility of reducing five contestants to four.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 69
programme.desc: Bill Grainger is the special guest chef tonight and the four remaining contestants compete in a pressure test. The two weakest performers go into a sudden death taste test round where one of them will be eliminated.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 70
programme.desc: Donna Hay is Australia's best selling cookbook author. Tonight, the contestants must prepare their ultimate three course meal for Donna and the judges to taste. Just two contestants can get through to the final round of MasterChef Australia.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 71
programme.desc: In the final Masterclass of this series, and with the final of MasterChef Australia just around the corner, Sarah and the judges look back over the incredible journey that our top 20 contestants have come on since their very first auditions.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 72
programme.desc: Two contestants remain in the competition, and tonight, one will become MasterChef Australia. These two amateur cooks have been on an amazing journey since their first audition and both are equally deserving of their place.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S9 Ep. 1
programme.desc: The heat is on as MasterChef Australia returns for 2017. A fresh group of home cooks from around the country will eagerly tackle challenges that will see one of them take home the title & $250,000.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S9 Ep. 2
programme.desc: After a record-breaking first-round cook that saw an extraordinary 20 aprons handed out, only four aprons remain. Who will have what it takes to impress the judges?

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S9 Ep. 3
programme.desc: In the third and final round of the judge's auditions, six contestants are vying for the final apron, which will secure them a place in the top 24.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S9 Ep. 4
programme.desc: The Top 24 contestants enter the kitchen for their first mystery box challenge. Later, the bottom 4 will cook off in an elmination challenge. Who will be the first to leave MasterChef Australia 2017?

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S9 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Each judge has placed three of their favourite ingredients into the mystery box and contestants will have 75 minutes to create a remarkable dish for a chance at immunity.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S9 Ep. 7
programme.desc: The three contestants with the least impressive dishes from the invention test face off in the pressure test. To survive they must keep up with Gary Mehigan as he prepares his classic roast chicken.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S9 Ep. 8
programme.desc: The top three contestants from the invention test now compete in creating a family meal for four in half-an-hour. The winner will then take on a professional chef for a chance at immunity.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S8 Ep. 4
programme.desc: George, a schizophrenic homeless man, shows up on a beach prophesizing about death. The couple in the nearby beach apartment, Cynthia and Ethan, threaten to call the police.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S8 Ep. 5
programme.desc: When Steve Sloan is hospitalized for injuries sustained in a high-speed car chase, he wakes in a haze and watches with a blurred vision what looks like another patient being stabbed by one of the medical staff in his room.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S8 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Nurse Stacy Bradshaw tells Dr. Sloan about her skydiving escapades, and he politely turns down her extreme thrill-seeking invitation to come along.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S8 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Dr. Travis catches Dr. Sloan in his office, settling in with a bowl of popcorn to watch a reality television show, "Hot House," a "Big Brother" and "Real World" type series.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S8 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Mark's friends Stanley and Tammy have decided to preview Tammy's new fashion line at their wedding.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S8 Ep. 9
programme.desc: At a spiritual retreat, Beth Scarburough confronts Father Dominick about his failed friendship with her husband, Matt. She pleads for him to make amends with his former friend.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S8 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Cocky medical student, Hunter Koskov, coerces his classmates, Max and Jenny, to experiment with each other by inducing "death."

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S8 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Amanda does a guest spot as a nurse on the soap opera, where she serves as a medical consultant. Star actress Thalia faints during a scene and is rushed to the emergency room.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S8 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Julia Adams comes to Dr. Sloan for a check-up. She seems a little anxious. At the same time, a man comes running through the hospital and in one highly restricted lab, knocks over and breaks a test tube.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S8 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan questions old friend and newspaper baron Barclay about the security company.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S8 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Dr. Simon Hodiak, a noted cardiologist, is a gambling addict. When his bookie strong-arms him to repay his debt of $60,000, Simon sells his Porsche.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S8 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Maureen Tate is ogling over her nephew, Casey, with sister Grace. Maureen panics when there is a knock at the door, and the man's voice declares he is the police.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S8 Ep. 16
programme.desc: Old man Oscar Hemmings is being wheeled into surgery. As he is pushed through the halls, he has his lawyer, Mr. Bendix, take the names of doctors and workers in the hallway.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S8 Ep. 17
programme.desc: Journalist Ellen Sharp is meeting Phil Gwynn at a nightclub; apparently, he has a big scoop for her.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S8 Ep. 18
programme.desc: While Amanda Bentley visits Martin, a good friend, and benefactor of a visiting Communist Chinese dance troupe, Tako, the star dancer drops dead.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S8 Ep. 19
programme.desc: High-power and high-profile defense attorney, Roger Calendar, is brought into the emergency room with a near-fatal stabbing wound.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S8 Ep. 20
programme.desc: As Lt. Steve Sloan and his partner, Cheryl, pick up their favorite strawberry milkshakes, Steve is distracted by a beautiful woman.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S8 Ep. 21
programme.desc: Calvin Laird, Mark and Steve's neighbor, threatens his girlfriend violently when she challenges his mean behavior. His repeated playing of loud music bothers the Sloans to no end.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S8 Ep. 22
programme.desc: A film school buddy of Alex's is at Community General Hospital making a documentary about the legend of a ghost in the basement.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S3 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Ashley York murders her wealthy father and cleverly manipulates it to appear as though he killed himself. Dr. Sloan picks away at holes in the story, which leads him directly to Ashley.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S3 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan takes in an abandoned young girl found at the scene of a murder, while Steve and Jesse go about tracking down the killer.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S3 Ep. 3
programme.desc: The murder of a beautiful woman around a marine encampment raises suspicions. Dr. Sloan discovers more to her than meets the eye.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S3 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan suspects a cunning D.A. in the murder of an acquitted defendant.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S3 Ep. 5
programme.desc: A man wrongfully convicted of murder takes Dr. Sloan hostage. Dr. Sloan hears his story and works to prove the man's innocence. Jesse works feverishly to rescue Mark.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S3 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan shields George Karn from both Steve and Lt. Delaney while investigating his wife's murder.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S3 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Steve heads up the investigation when a serial cop killer is on the prowl, while inadvertently dating the killer.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S3 Ep. 8
programme.desc: An exhausted Jesse, coming off a 48-hour stint in the hospital, witnesses a man die in the parking garage. Jesse returns with help only to find the man alive.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S3 Ep. 18
programme.desc: Wayne, Margo and Bazza barricade themselves in a shop when their robbery goes wrong.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S3 Ep. 19
programme.desc: The Gaffney Siege continues but will it end in bloodshed?

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S3 Ep. 20
programme.desc: Gaffney causes trouble when she finds out that her boyfriend has died in hospital.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S3 Ep. 21
programme.desc: Lizzy Birdsworth requests a day out - but what exactly is she up to?

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S3 Ep. 22
programme.desc: Lizzie enjoys her time on the run. Meg's husband Bob is increasingly sick of her job.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S3 Ep. 23
programme.desc: The conjugal visiting suite is set up, and Hazel is the first to enjoy a special visit.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S3 Ep. 24
programme.desc: Bea's boycott of the visiting suite doesn't go down too well with the other women.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S3 Ep. 25
programme.desc: Bea allows herself to be dragged through the mud for the benefit of the other women.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S3 Ep. 26
programme.desc: Bea is forced to say goodbye to Ken, and Chrissie Latham is released.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S3 Ep. 27
programme.desc: Latham's dangerous attitude could cost her parole and custody of Elizabeth.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S3 Ep. 28
programme.desc: The women are down on Doreen for having censorship brought back.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S3 Ep. 29
programme.desc: David is forced to resign for inciting the strike, and Latham's boyfriend is arrested.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S3 Ep. 30
programme.desc: Latham is forced to say goodbye to Mick as he is extradited to South Australia.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S3 Ep. 31
programme.desc: Erica Davidson is sacked, and Bea is shanghaied in the middle of the night.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S3 Ep. 32
programme.desc: The women agree to lift the barricade and end the hunger strike.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S3 Ep. 33
programme.desc: Marie Winter and her gang drug Bea. Erica decides to have Bea brought back to Wentworth.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S3 Ep. 34
programme.desc: Margo's terror campaign continues, and Gaffney takes over as Top Dog.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S3 Ep. 36
programme.desc: Terry finds Bea distraught - but Lizzie and Doreen are convinced she's faking it.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S3 Ep. 37
programme.desc: Still unaware of the bet, Vera goes on another date with Terry.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S3 Ep. 38
programme.desc: In an attempt to get released, Bea pretends to still have amnesia.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S3 Ep. 39
programme.desc: Bea makes a massive sacrifice for Mum, and Vera makes a decision about her future.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S3 Ep. 40
programme.desc: The power of her position begins to get to Lizzie's head.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S3 Ep. 41
programme.desc: Terry bribes Margo for information, and Nick confuses his feelings for Meg.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S3 Ep. 42
programme.desc: Arna, a visitor from Sweden, arrives at Wentworth. Margo accuses Terry of assaulting her.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: New prisoners Karen and Lynn are admitted to Wentworth Detention Centre.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Franky siezes the chance to take over and announces she is now in charge.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: With Franky's hold growing, temperatures reach boiling point in an all-out riot.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S1 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Rosie gives birth to a boy, and Eddie tells Marilyn he saw who stabbed Bill.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S1 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Frankie and Bea fight during a dance class, and Yates is caught smuggling for Marilyn.

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords S2 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Updates from cases from the first series, including a couple who purchased a building in which they hoped to establish a charity for children, that became overrun by squatters.

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Ben has just 24 hours to rehouse a single mother and her child or they will end up on the streets, and 70-year-old Joan has to start legal proceedings to evict her tenant.

programme.title: Who The Bleep Did I Marry? S2 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Margo Bennett was a FBI agent in Atlanta when she met and married Gene Bennett, an undercover agent. Gene scammed the FBI for money.

programme.title: Vanity Fair Confidential AU S2 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Tupac Shakur was a revolutionary, a poet, and a music industry phenomenon. Gunned down at 25-years-old, his death remains a mystery until investigators uncover a disturbing new lead.

programme.title: Vanity Fair Confidential AU S3 Ep. 10
programme.desc: An elite New England prep school is under fire for decades-old allegations of sexual abuse of students by staff members. How high will the number of victims and perpetrators climb?

programme.title: Who The Bleep Did I Marry? S1 Ep. 8
programme.desc: 23 year old Mildred Muhammad fell in love and soon married John Williams, a handsome and confident man. But events of the Gulf War turned him cold and abusive.

programme.title: Vanity Fair Confidential AU S4 Ep. 4
programme.desc: When governor's aide vanishes without a trace, her disappearance sets off an investigation exposing the dark secrets of one of the most powerful men in the state.

programme.title: Vanity Fair Confidential AU S2 Ep. 9
programme.desc: The story of an heiress and a revered Argentinian polo player whose worlds collide on a 340-acre estate. And only one would live to talk about it.

programme.title: Who The Bleep Did I Marry? S2 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Tammi meets Eric Perteet at a nightclub. The two are married and Eric is hired at a local hospital but when Eric is arrested for impersonating a doctor, Tammi is left to figure out who her husband is.

programme.title: Who The Bleep Did I Marry? S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Jeanne Trantel had a beautiful home, great kids, and a loving husband. Then her life was shattered when Stephen was convicted of robbing banks because of the loss of his job.

programme.title: Vanity Fair Confidential AU S2 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Author Katie Tarbox and Detective Michele Deery share a mission to expose the dark truth about sexual predators who use the internet to find their victims.

programme.title: Vanity Fair Confidential AU S2 Ep. 1
programme.desc: How did Maria Cruz, a 35-year-old analyst for Barclays Capital who vanished on April 13, 2003, end up buried beneath a concrete slab at an old mansion in Newark, New Jersey?

programme.title: Vanity Fair Confidential AU S1 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Phil Spector, dubbed the mad genius of rock n roll had a penchant for guns. When police are called to his mansion

programme.title: Vanity Fair Confidential AU S3 Ep. 1
programme.desc: A star athlete from a wealthy family brutally rapes several teenage girls and threatens to kill them if they tell anyone. An international manhunt ensues and he eludes capture by the FBI and Interpol.

programme.title: I Shouldn't Be Alive S3 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Three hunters in the wilderness of Kyrgyzstan become trapped by blizzards.

programme.title: I Shouldn't Be Alive S3 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Young couple Brandon and Gina are on a trip to a Palm Springs mountain range when they find themselves lost.

programme.title: Vanity Fair Confidential AU S2 Ep. 5
programme.desc: A con artist poses as a member of the Rockefeller family, and his story is one of treachery, extortion, abduction, and murder.

programme.title: Vanity Fair Confidential AU S3 Ep. 7
programme.desc: A Texas drifter claims to have committed hundreds of brutal murders. Case after case is closed. He is sentenced to death. But some investigators wonder if they have the real killer behind bars.

programme.title: Who The Bleep Did I Marry? S2 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Diane Beasley thought she had found love with John Smith. After a short courtship, they tied the knot. All was well, until the FBI showed up.

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: A couple discover that their tenant has been using their property to scam students out of deposits. A housing team investigate dire conditions endured by tenants in a cramped, cold flat.

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords S2 Ep. 5
programme.desc: After moving abroad for work, a landlord discovers that his tenants have left him over 20,000 pounds behind with his mortgage.

programme.title: Vanity Fair Confidential AU S4 Ep. 12
programme.desc: A New York socialite is terrorized by a sadistic stalker who threatens to kidnap her daughter. Who is he? Why is he torturing her? And just how far will he go?

programme.title: Vanity Fair Confidential AU S1 Ep. 11
programme.desc: More than 500 men claim that when they attended a Florida reform school, they suffered horrifying beatings and abuse. Now, investigators uncover a disturbing legacy and unimaginable truths.

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords S1 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Margaret tries to get the 20,000 pounds she is owed from a letting agent, and Peterborough council find 12 people crammed into a category-one fire hazard house.

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords S2 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Rose lost her job and had to rent out her house, but then the tenant stopped paying rent. Selina and Lee moved to the US and let out their UK home, but now they have to go to court.

programme.title: Who The Bleep Did I Marry? S1 Ep. 7
programme.desc: A Mormon named Dorie Olds of Salt Lake City thought she found a perfect mate in Mark Hofmann. Little did she know that Hofmann would pursue an unusual job, forging historical documents.

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords S2 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Catching up with some of the previously featured tenants and landlords. Lesley and Mark's tenant turned out to be a con artist scamming students.

programme.title: I Shouldn't Be Alive S3 Ep. 3
programme.desc: A paramedic with years of experience is crushed under his quad bike on a remote hillside.

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords S2 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Revisiting tenants and landlords from earlier episodes to find out what happened next.

programme.title: Who The Bleep Did I Marry? S2 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Joy DeSomber and her new husband Joseph Cua are living the good life. But it all comes to a halt when Joseph tells Joy that his dear friends, the Wagners, have been brutally murdered.

programme.title: Vanity Fair Confidential AU S3 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Deep in Louisiana bayou country, a man is found brutally murdered in a nightclub. A handwritten note soaked in the victim's blood reads: You gave me AIDS. Police have more questions than answers.

programme.title: Who The Bleep Did I Marry? S1 Ep. 12
programme.desc: In 2005, Joe found himself in line at the mall when he struck up a conversation with a pretty girl. They were married soon after, but Joe would be the second in a line of future illegitimate husbands.

programme.title: Vanity Fair Confidential AU S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: When Lisl Auman was falsely convicted of murdering a police officer, gonzo journalist Hunter S. Thompson began his campaign to expose the brutality, corruption & flaws of the legal system to free Lisl

programme.title: The Entitled
programme.desc: A young man, broke and jobless, abducts three rich college kids to try and get money from their fathers.

programme.title: Berlin Syndrome
programme.desc: An Australian photojournalist awakens in a Berlin apartment one morning and is unable to leave.

programme.title: Finding Your Feet
programme.desc: When a woman discovers her husband is having an affair, she seeks refuge with her estranged sister Bif.

programme.title: Vamps
programme.desc: Two socialite vampires in New York City fall in love while being pursued by vampire hunters.

programme.title: Scary Movie 5
programme.desc: A couple begin to experience some unusual activity after bringing their lost nieces and nephew home.

programme.title: The Switch
programme.desc: Best friends accidentally become closer than they ever expected when one of them decides to have a baby.

programme.title: I Feel Pretty
programme.desc: A woman struggling with insecurity wakes from a fall believing she is the most beautiful woman on the planet.

programme.title: Around the World in 80 Days
programme.desc: To win a bet, an eccentric British inventor embarks on a trip around the world in exactly eighty days.

programme.title: Gods of Egypt
programme.desc: A mortal teams with the god Horus in an alliance against Set, the god of darkness, who usurped Egypt's throne.

programme.title: Death Proof
programme.desc: A group of women are stalked by a scarred stuntman who uses his "death proof" cars for his deadly plans.

programme.title: Planet Terror
programme.desc: After a bio-weapon turns thousands into zombies, it's up to a rag-tag group of survivors to stop the infected.

programme.title: The Details
programme.desc: After 10 years of marriage, Jeff and Nealy Lang have an idyllic suburban home and a relationship on the skids.

programme.title: An Actor Prepares
programme.desc: After suffering a heart attack, an actor is forced to drive across country with his estranged son.

programme.title: South Park S5 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Cr***le Fight: It's Timmy vs. Jimmy! But does Jimmy know this? The boys are joining the Scouts (troop 69) but their parents aren't so sure when they discover who the Scout Leader is. (S5, E02)

programme.title: South Park S5 Ep. 3
programme.desc: After the other boys explain to Cartman that pubes don't count unless you grow your own, Cartman realizes he's been tricked by the school bully, Scott Tenorman.

programme.title: South Park S5 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Terrance and Phillip - Behind The Blow: The boys face death at the hands of some unhinged environmentalists unless they can re-unite Terrance and Phillip for a show at Earth Day Festival! (S5, E05)

programme.title: South Park S5 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Cartmanland: When Cartman inherits $1million and purchases his own theme park, Stan starts to question his faith in God. It's not long before things start to go out of control for Cartman. (S5, E06)

programme.title: South Park S5 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Proper Condom Use: After Cartman and Stan play "red rocket" with their dogs, their parents decide it's time for some school sex education. What the school provides creates worse problems! (S5, E07)

programme.title: South Park S5 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Towelie: Stan's mother buys the boys a console called The Okama Gamesphere but it is stolen whilst they are at school. To get it back they must help a talking towel take on the government! (S5, E08)

programme.title: South Park S5 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Osama Bin Laden Has Farty Pants: The boys send $1 to Afghan children and receive a goat back. When they try to return it an adventure ensues! First episode to air after 9/11. (S5, E09)

programme.title: South Park S5 Ep. 9
programme.desc: How To Eat With Your Butt: It's school photo time. Kenny decides to play a prank by wearing his parka upside down and revealing his buttocks. Cartman decides to take it a step further. (S5, E10)

programme.title: South Park S5 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Mr. Garrison gets fed up with long lines, delayed flights and the airline industry in general and invents his own transportation device.

programme.title: South Park S5 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Token is tired of being the only rich kid in town, and succeeds in attracting several other wealthy families to South Park.

programme.title: South Park S5 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Butters' Very Own Episode: Butters' mum asks him to spy on his dad, however what he discovers leaves Mrs Stoch acting slightly unhinged. Will this be the end of our lil blonde haired buddy? (S5, E14)

programme.title: South Park S5 Ep. 514
programme.desc: Kenny Dies: When Kenny is diagnosed with a terminal illness, Stan takes it especially hard. Will Cartman's truck load of foetuses help with a cure? Or does he have other plans for them... (S5, E13)

programme.title: South Park S6 Ep. 15
programme.desc: When a famous psychic fails to help him exorcise Kenny from his body, Cartman and Chef travel to the moors of Scotland, where Chef's mom tries a little of her voodoo magic on him.

programme.title: South Park S7 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Jimmy and Timmy pull together a group of people like themselves and call their new club the "Crips."

programme.title: South Park S7 Ep. 703
programme.desc: Toilet Paper: Mrs. Dreibel gives the boys detention for making a phallus out of clay in art class. Angry, they take revenge by toilet papering her house. Officer Barbrady is on their trail. (S7, E03)

programme.title: South Park S7 Ep. 704
programme.desc: Cancelled: The boys get a sense of deja vu as Cartman again has an anal probe, but they soon realise they're actually stuck in some kind of re-run - Earth is just a reality show for aliens! (S7, E01)

programme.title: South Park S7 Ep. 705
programme.desc: Fat Butt and Pancake Head: When Cartman wins a diversity event with his offensive hand puppet impersonation of Jennifer Lopez, Kyle is enraged. Soon the real J-Lo turns up, mightily peeved! (S7, E05)

programme.title: South Park S7 Ep. 706
programme.desc: Lil' Crime Stoppers: Stan, Kyle, Cartman and Kenny decide to play detective; they go around the town solving minor "crimes" for a dollar. It's not long before they're busting meth labs! (S7, E06)

programme.title: South Park S7 Ep. 707
programme.desc: Red Man's Greed: When the entire town is bought out by a Native American casino, the boys come up with a plan to get their homes back - but is more gambling really the solution? (S7, E07)

programme.title: South Park S7 Ep. 708
programme.desc: South Park is Gay! The TV show Queer Eye For The Straight Guy is sweeping the nation and the men of South Park are embracing metrosexuality, but what evil plan are the hosts plotting? (S7, E08)

programme.title: South Park S7 Ep. 709
programme.desc: Christian Hard Rock: The boys form a band called Moop, but disagree on what direction they should take. Cartman leaves the band and bets them he will have a platinum record first! (S7, E09)

programme.title: South Park S7 Ep. 711
programme.desc: Casa Bonita: Cartman is overjoyed at going to a Mexican restaurant for Kyle's birthday but is crushed when he finds out Butters is invited instead. He'll have to make Butters "disappear". (S7, E11)

programme.title: South Park S7 Ep. 712
programme.desc: All About The Mormons: A new family moves to South Park and their son Gary is an unusually perfect Mormon - this angers the boys no end! Will Stan beat him up or go for a family dinner?! (S7, E12)

programme.title: South Park S7 Ep. 713
programme.desc: Butt Out: When the boys' smoking leads to a nasty incident, it's the cigarettes that are blamed rather than them. Cue the glutinous Rob Reiner to arrive in town with his anti-smoking lobby! (S7, E13)

programme.title: South Park S7 Ep. 714
programme.desc: Raisins: When Wendy breaks up with Stan he takes it hard. The boys decide to take him to the restaurant Raisins, where all of the employees are preteen girls who enjoy wearing heavy make-up. (S7, E14)

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 7
programme.desc: The children of South Park are attracted to "Mr. Jefferson," the new neighbor in town, and Cartman goes out of his way to get "Mr. Jefferson" to love him best.

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 8
programme.desc: A PETA protest against the use of a cow as South Park Elementary's mascot forces the student body to choose a new one.

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 9
programme.desc: In order to save South Park, Stan and Kyle have to find a way to destroy the ever-expanding Wall-Mart superstore while keeping Cartman from stabbing them in the back.

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 801
programme.desc: Good Times With Weapons: After buying martial arts weapons at a local flea market, the boys are transformed into anime Japanese Warriors, with dire consequences for poor Professor Chaos. (S8, E01)

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 803
programme.desc: Up The Down Steroid: Jimmy is due to take part in the Special Olympics but what dodgy substance is he talked into taking? Cartman fakes being disabled so he can enter and win a $1,000. (S8, E02)

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 804
programme.desc: The Passion of the Jew: After seeing 'The Passion of the Christ' a zealous Cartman taunts Kyle. When Stan and Kenny see it, they hate it and harass a crazed Mel Gibson for their money back! (S8, E03)

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 805
programme.desc: You Got F'd in the A: The boys get 'served' by some kids from the O.C. so now 'it's on!'. Stan puts together a dance troupe who must compete in the dance-off. Will Randy's moves save them? (S8, E04)

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 806
programme.desc: Goobacks: South Park is swamped by workers from the future, who take all the jobs for less pay. The men of South Park go to unusual lengths to stop them. "Dey turk err jurbs!" (S8, E07)

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 810
programme.desc: Pre-School: The boys are pooping their pants after hearing that Trent, a notorious bully from their pre-school years, is being released from juvenile hall - guess who put him there? (S8, E10)

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 811
programme.desc: Quest For Ratings: When the gang's school news programme trails far behind Craig's show, "Animals Close-Up With a Wide-Angle Lens", they pledge to boost their ratings - how far will they go? (S8, E11)

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 812
programme.desc: Stupid Spoiled ***** Video Playset: Paris Hilton opens a store in South Park, corrupting the town's girls in the process. It's up to Mr Slave to put things right - time for a "***** off!" (S8, E12)

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 813
programme.desc: Cartman's Incredible Gift: Cartman jumps off his roof while wearing cardboard wings and ends up in a coma. When he awakens he believes he has psychic powers - and the police believe it too! (S8, E13)

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 814
programme.desc: Woodland Critter Christmas: Stan finds talking animals building a Christmas tree in the woods. They enlist him to protect them from an evil mountain lion but things aren't what they seem. (S8, E14)

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 2
programme.desc: When hippie drum circles start popping up in people's attics and backyards the citizens of South Park have no choice but to turn to Eric Cartman for help.

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 3
programme.desc: The boys set up a talent agency and pool all their resources and impress their first client only to have another agency steal him away.

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 11
programme.desc: After the sudden on-set of the disease Gingervitis, Cartman rallies all other ginger kids to rise up and assume their role as the master race.

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 13
programme.desc: The boys try to rescue their new friend Willzyx, a talking space whale, from the Denver Sea Park, and with the help of MASA (Mexican Aeronautica y Spacia Administracion) get him home to the moon for $200.

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Stan is embarrassed when his dad gets pulled over for drunk driving. Randy believes that only one thing can save him from his 'disease,' a bleeding statue of the Virgin Mary in the next town.

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 901
programme.desc: Mr Garrison's Fancy New Vagina: Mr Garrison has a sex change, Kyle has an unusual operation to make him tall and athletic enough to play basketball and Kyle's dad has "dolphinoplasty"!?! (S9, E01)

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 904
programme.desc: Best Friends Forever: Kenny is in a coma. Cartman wants life-support turned off so he can get his PSP. But Kenny's spirit is leading the armies of heaven against the demons of hell! (S9, E04)

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 905
programme.desc: The Losing Edge: The boys are bored of playing baseball, and concoct a plan to lose the big play-off game. Randy trains hard to become the biggest drunken jackass at each match. (S9, E05)

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 906
programme.desc: The Death of Eric Cartman: Everyone decides to ignore Cartman! He is convinced he is dead and must find peace by making amends for his past sins. Will Butters' 'psychic ability' help him? (S9, E06)

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 907
programme.desc: Erection Day: Jimmy's noticed that one of his body parts has a mind of his own, so he tries to control his raging hormones in time to perform his comedy routine at the School Talent Show. (S9, E07)

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 908
programme.desc: Two Days Before The Day After Tomorrow: Stan and Cartman crash a speed boat into the world's largest beaver dam, flooding the town of Beaverton. Everyone's response is that of mass hysteria! (S9, E08)

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 909
programme.desc: Marjorine: Cartman is convinced that the girls have a device which can see into the future. The boys come up with a plan to take it. Unfortunately for Butters he's a major part of the plan. (S9, E09)

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 910
programme.desc: Follow That Egg: In a bid to prevent Mr. Slave from marrying Big Gay Al, Mrs. Garrison forces the children to help him in an experiment to prove that gay marriages are unstable. (S9. E10)

programme.title: Drawn Together S1 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Spanky teaches Clara to step outside of her comfort zone, while Xandir and Captain Hero bond.

programme.title: Ugly Americans S1 Ep. 7
programme.desc: An obsessive-compulsive giant ape needs a job, and Callie struggles with her sudden attraction to Twayne.

programme.title: Daria S4 Ep. 407
programme.desc: Daria joins Jake on a business trip where he tries to court a big-name client, and Helen tries to bond with Quinn at a sleepover.

programme.title: Daria S4 Ep. 404
programme.desc: Daria dreams up a murder mystery at her school after Kevin and the football team are suspected of cheating on a test.

programme.title: The Ren & Stimpy Show S4 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Ren & Stimpy journey to the Blue-Cheese Mountains to become miners. After dealing with some savages, they finally reach the blessed mountains where they mine the cheese and dream of being rich.

programme.title: Ugly Americans S1 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Mark helps Leonard with his magic wand issues, and Twayne Boneraper meets his two-dimensional soulmate.

programme.title: The Ren & Stimpy Show S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: After winning a contest for Gritty Kitty Litter.

programme.title: Ugly Americans S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Callie goes baby-crazy when Mark fosters a demon orphan, and Twayne notices odd changes in his body.

programme.title: Daria S3 Ep. 311
programme.desc: Daria and Jane wonder if aliens have taken over their town after Secret Service agents urge the students at Lawndale High to report anyone who exhibits strange behaviors.

programme.title: Ugly Americans S2 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Grimes' judgmental mother rises from the dead, and a neglected Randall reconsiders his living situation.

programme.title: Daria S5 Ep. 510
programme.desc: Helen agrees to help her niece with her divorce, Jake leaves home to escape Helen and Aunt Rita's bickering, Daria avoids Tom, and Stacy and Tiffany face a fashion dilemma.

programme.title: Daria S5 Ep. 509
programme.desc: Daria and Jane's friendship is tested when Jane dates an opinionated guy with a love for everything vintage, and Upchuck tries his hand at magic.

programme.title: The Ren & Stimpy Show S4 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Stimpy's stupidity becomes too much for Ren and he leaves home to become a hermit. All alone, Ren begins to go crazy because he misses his true friend.

programme.title: The Ren & Stimpy Show S4 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Ren and Stimpy find themselves in elf and gnome world where everyone happily works to graduate Pixie status. Stimpy loves his new work, but Ren thinks it's too hard and everyone is too happy.

programme.title: Ugly Americans S2 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Randall is infected by horrifying plants at sea when Twayne throws a cruise ship party.

programme.title: Drawn Together S3 Ep. 8
programme.desc: The situation grows increasingly dire for everyone trapped in the van, and Foxxy is taken captive.

programme.title: Drawn Together S3 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Becoming a breakfast cereal mascot leads Wooldoor to fame and Crunch Berries addiction.

programme.title: Daria S3 Ep. 302
programme.desc: When Daria volunteers at a retirement home, she discovers that her tone makes her as unpopular with the senior citizens as it does with her peers.

programme.title: Daria S3 Ep. 306
programme.desc: Jake gets Daria a job after she reveals the result of her career aptitude test, Trent and Jesse attempt to write a new song, and Jane tries to save Daria from humiliation.

programme.title: Ugly Americans S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Mark cares for an undocumented werewolf, and Leonard envies his famous magician brother, Christ Angel.

programme.title: Daria S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: When the Morgendorffers move to Lawndale, bubbly younger daughter Quinn becomes instantly popular while her sarcastic sister Daria is told to work on her self-esteem.

programme.title: Daria S1 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Jane and Trent head to a Lane family reunion, and Helen decides to take the Morgendorffer's on a family camping trip for rest and relaxation.

programme.title: Drawn Together S1 Ep. 8
programme.desc: The housemates rise up against the dreaded "Reality TV Twist."

programme.title: Daria S2 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Daria struggles with Jane's unexpected desire to be on the school track team.

programme.title: Daria S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: When ditzy cheerleader Brittany invites Daria to a party with the popular kids, Quinn reveals that she'll also be attending the party.

programme.title: Ugly Americans S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: A New York Department of Integration social worker helps supernatural creatures adapt to city life.

programme.title: Drawn Together S2 Ep. 14
programme.desc: The roommates gather for a very special clip show reunion sit-down with The Producer.

programme.title: Daria S1 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Quinn feels so pressured to get plastic surgery after another Fashion Club member gets a nose job that she pulls Daria out of class to go to a consultation with her.

programme.title: The Ren & Stimpy Show S5 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Ren and Stimpy are preparing for Yaksmas, the wonderful holiday where Stinky Weezelteats and his sidekick Yak visit and leave great gifts, such as hot link sausages and pre-chewed gum.

programme.title: Ugly Americans S1 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Manbird season hits New York City, and Mark finds himself the guardian of a fledgling separated from its flock.

programme.title: The Ren & Stimpy Show S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Commander Hoek and Cadet Stimpy, on a 36 year mission in space, go crazy from boredom. Penniless and hungry, Ren and Stimpy seek work as mice catchers - with Ren as the bait.

programme.title: Drawn Together S3 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Captain Hero attempts to pledge a new neighborhood Greek family, and Ling Ling's dad moves in.

programme.title: Drawn Together S3 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Captain Hero must become cool in order to save the world, and Toot and Ling-Ling take up cockfighting.

programme.title: Daria S4 Ep. 406
programme.desc: During Lawndale's homecoming parade, Daria and Tom find themselves reluctantly wrangling a precocious child together.

programme.title: Daria S2 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Lawndale High holds a medieval fair to raise money for a new library roof, and Quinn tries out for the lead in a play.

programme.title: Drawn Together S2 Ep. 1
programme.desc: The surviving roommates return home to cast a new roommate.

programme.title: The Ren & Stimpy Show S4 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Stimpy becomes overly superstitious. He continues to live by his superstitions and Ren keeps disbelieving. Ren and Stimpy travel to a new country and take the viewer along.

programme.title: Drawn Together S2 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Captain Hero faces off against Super Nanny, and Ling-Ling grapples with his cultural identity.

programme.title: Daria S5 Ep. 504
programme.desc: Daria and Quinn attend a camp reunion, Trent does some soul-searching, and Jake and Helen air their grievances while cleaning the garage.

programme.title: Ugly Americans S2 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Twayne and Callie build a summer camp to cover up their raid on a wizard training ground.

programme.title: Daria S2 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Jane and Daria team up for an art contest depicting their idea of student life at the dawn of the millennium, but their negative approach doesn't sit well with everyone.

programme.title: Daria S2 Ep. 2
programme.desc: The students of Lawndale High take a paint-balling field trip, and Daria and Quinn are in for a surprise when their parents sign up as chaperones.

programme.title: The Ren & Stimpy Show S5 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Ren is suffering from allergies. Little does he know that he may be allergic to his best pal. Ren and Stimpy leave the country when it rains and their fields are ruined with fruits and vegetables.

programme.title: Daria S5 Ep. 511
programme.desc: Daria has mixed feelings when she applies for a scholarship sponsored by a company known for unethical business practices, and Jane resents the scholarship process.

programme.title: Daria S5 Ep. 506
programme.desc: A teachers' strike at Lawndale High results in Daria instructing Quinn's English class, and teachers turn to Trent and Jane for artistic advice.

programme.title: Ugly Americans S1 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Councilman Fitzpatrick sells his soul to Twayne, and Callie considers a cushy job in Hell.

programme.title: Drawn Together S2 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Captain Hero and Wooldoor battle over Unusually Flexible Girl, and Foxxy has a run-in with Foxxy 5.

programme.title: The Ren & Stimpy Show S1 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Ren and Stimpy pass through a black hole and mutate in their strange surroundings. Stimpy invents a happy helmet that pushes the naturally angry Ren past the happy limit into madness.

programme.title: Daria S3 Ep. 309
programme.desc: Two wacky radio DJs broadcast their show outside of Lawndale High, and Daria's grandma Ruth moves into the Morgendorffer household after Jake suffers a medical emergency.

programme.title: The Ren & Stimpy Show S4 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Ren & Stimpy go to the Natural History Museum to see the skeletal remains of the mammoth Stimpysaurus. Wilbur Cobb tells them about the evolution of the great beast.

programme.title: Daria S3 Ep. 305
programme.desc: The editor of a teen magazine comes to Lawndale High to hang out with Daria, Jake struggles with the latest teen lingo, and Jane's clever idea begins to take root.

programme.title: Daria S5 Ep. 513
programme.desc: The delivery of the family's new refrigerator stirs up repressed childhood memories for Daria and leads to a much-needed talk with her parents.

programme.title: Drawn Together S2 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Foxxy challenges the Board of Education, and Spanky and Xandir embark on a sham marriage for insurance.

programme.title: Daria S5 Ep. 508
programme.desc: Daria feels apprehensive about inviting Tom to a dinner with her parents, and Quinn has unrealistic expectations when she decides she wants a steady boyfriend.

programme.title: Drawn Together S3 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Captain Hero commits to a special needs giant, and Clara goes Munchausen-by-proxy with Wooldoor.

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 21
programme.desc: Dr. John Becker's laundry, apartment, and mail have all been tampered with and he is sure the culprit is one of his pesky neighbors.

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 22
programme.desc: When John receives some expensive steaks from a patient, his new neighbor Chris cajoles him into throwing a party.

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 23
programme.desc: John is surprisingly concerned when he learns that his new neighbor Chris has left town without saying goodbye.

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 24
programme.desc: Reggie and Chris compete for John's affection. Linda takes Margaret out for a night on the town.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 1
programme.desc: John enters the diner from Reggie's apartment, trying to sneak out.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Now that Reggie is gone, John tells Chris he has feelings for her (Chris).

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 3
programme.desc: John sits on his fire escape, smoking a cigar, the smoke from which is wafting into Chris's open window directly above.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 4
programme.desc: As John and Jake chat about Chris at the diner, Bob rushes in and announces that he just saw Chris naked when he went to fix her faucet.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Becker has a videotape of a French film that he plans to use to lure Chris into coming over to his place.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Becker tries to discourage a friend from expressing interest in Chris by telling him that she is gay.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 9
programme.desc: At the diner, Chris is in the kitchen when a robber enters.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Christmas Episode- At the diner, John expresses his repulsion for all the Christmas decorations.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 11
programme.desc: At the office, Margaret reveals to Linda that it's her ten-year anniversary of working for Dr. Becker.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 12
programme.desc: One of John's patients, a high school student named Brad, comes in for a physical and John learns that the guy's being sexually active, but isn't practicing safe sex. John performs an HIV test on Brad and tries to convince him to begin practicing safe sex.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Bob is distraught because a thirty-something guy at his gym died while on the treadmill, and he's certain that he's headed for the same fate.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Becker is upset when a patient substitutes his Christian Science faith for medical treatment.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 15
programme.desc: John helps his elderly neighbor, Mrs. Firth, get into her apartment and she repays him by making homemade chicken noodle soup.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 16
programme.desc: John's at the end of his rope with his hectic practice and makes a call, which Linda overhears, telling the person on the other end that he can't take another day.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 17
programme.desc: When a customer leaves the diner because of John's cigarette smoke, Chris puts her foot down and tells him that it is now a "smoke-free" restaurant.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 18
programme.desc: John arrives at the diner and announces that he has quit smoking.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 19
programme.desc: John walks into the diner and sees Chris, Bob, and Jake standing around a booth.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 20
programme.desc: The fire marshal threatens to fine Chris for a faulty sprinkler system at the diner, but Chris flirts her way out of it.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 21
programme.desc: Chris' ex-husband, Roger, is in town and comes to the diner to see her.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 22
programme.desc: John has a dream that he and Chris kissed each other. At the office, Linda is late and tells Margaret it's because her cab got hit by a runaway hotdog cart.

programme.title: Becker S6 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Highlights from last season include Chris and John exchanging "I love yous" as Chris is wheeled into surgery for an appendectomy.

programme.title: Becker S6 Ep. 2
programme.desc: At the diner, Jake bemoans his poor financial status, and Hector proposes that he participates in a drug-testing program to earn money.

programme.title: Becker S6 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Chris and John have their first impromptu date, but Chris wants something more formal before taking the relationship any further, and tells John so.

programme.title: Becker S6 Ep. 4
programme.desc: John takes Chris out for their first official date - to a cheap Chinese restaurant. both are excited about the possibility of their "first time."

programme.title: Becker S6 Ep. 5
programme.desc: As John and Chris get more serious in their relationship, Chris realizes that John is not as affectionate as she'd like him to be.

programme.title: Becker S6 Ep. 6
programme.desc: At the diner, Hector tries to talk Jake into giving him money to invest in coffee futures, but Jake resists.

programme.title: Becker S6 Ep. 7
programme.desc: It's Thanksgiving and Chris wants to make dinner for John, who is totally against holidays.

programme.title: Becker S6 Ep. 8
programme.desc: At the diner, Jake receives a letter and is shocked to find out that his late grandmother has left him $25,000.

programme.title: Becker S6 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Margaret tells John that a letter for a medical conference has arrived, but John scoffs, saying it's just an excuse for doctors to have a weekend in Las Vegas.

programme.title: Becker S6 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Chris, Jake, Hector, and Linda are at the diner. Chris serves Linda her breakfast as John walks in and tells Linda that she needs to get to the office and help Margaret.

programme.title: Becker S6 Ep. 11
programme.desc: At the diner, Chris and Jake complain about the cold weather when John walks in, happy because it's cold and flu season, which means more patients.

programme.title: Becker S6 Ep. 12
programme.desc: At the diner, Jake is looking for someone to go downtown and pick up Stevie Wonder concert tickets for him with no luck.

programme.title: Becker S6 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Chris fears that John is going to break up with her after he invites her to dinner at a nice restaurant with no explanation.

programme.title: Becker S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: An enraged and irascible Dr. John Becker (Ted Danson) enters the diner in his typical bad mood and sends the patrons fleeing.

programme.title: Becker S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Becker arrives at the diner to find Reggie and Jake discussing their plans to take a sculpting class.

programme.title: Becker S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Becker is bombarded by sexual overtones throughout the day, beginning with a sensual dream that is interrupted by a neighbor's blaring music.

programme.title: Becker S1 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Becker enters the diner to find Reggie in a rotten mood. After some prodding, she reveals that her ballplayer boyfriend just dumped her.

programme.title: Becker S1 Ep. 5
programme.desc: While railing on the evils of Beanie Babies, Becker gets annoyed when an overly friendly delivery guy named Todd stops by the diner.

programme.title: Becker S1 Ep. 6
programme.desc: While Becker is at the diner with Jake and Reggie, an odd little man named Bob enters.

programme.title: Becker S1 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Becker is livid when he is awakened by a brightly flickering streetlight outside his window.

programme.title: Becker S1 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Becker throws his back out at home while trying to close a stuck window.

programme.title: Becker S1 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Already in a bad mood, Becker vents his frustration to a man on his cell phone, whose wife is in labor.

programme.title: Becker S1 Ep. 10
programme.desc: A reporter makes trouble for Becker when he writes an article depicting Becker's "non-politically correct" behavior.

programme.title: Becker S1 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Becker promises a friend that he will write a medical article for him, but gets frustrated with numerous distractions.

programme.title: Becker S1 Ep. 12
programme.desc: When Becker arrives at the diner on Valentine’s Day, he is displeased to find wall-to-wall make-out sessions.

programme.title: Becker S1 Ep. 13

programme.title: Becker S1 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Becker learns that an elderly patient, Mr. Fowler, has suffered from a heart attack and calls his daughter to tell her the bad news.

programme.title: Offspring S3 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Still reeling after learning of her true parents, Nina meets with Darcy to find out how he's coping. Both hurt and confused by the news, Nina & Darcy downplay their feelings trying to save their pain.

programme.title: Offspring S3 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Burying concerns over the identity of her biological father, Nina focuses on the hunt for a rental property with Patrick. Later, Nina's forced to confront the issue when Billie reveals some answers.

programme.title: Offspring S3 Ep. 4
programme.desc: A week after moving in with Patrick, Nina worries that living & working together is putting a strain on their relationship; later, Nina gets a surprise call from Dr Noonan hoping to catch Geraldine.

programme.title: Offspring S3 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Nina arrives at work shocked to discover Patrick is being investigated over an allegation of patient abuse.

programme.title: Offspring S3 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Worried about their first big fight and Patrick's night alone at a motel, Nina finds Patrick at work to apologise. Mick and Rosanna continue to forge their musical partnership.

programme.title: Offspring S3 Ep. 7

programme.title: Offspring S3 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Nina wakes up hung over in a stranger's bed, faced with overwhelming evidence she's had a one night stand. Meanwhile, with Nina missing from work and home, Patrick's concern leads him to investigate.

programme.title: Offspring S3 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Nina finds herself at the heart of Proudman family chaos, while trying to assure Patrick her relationship with Adam is platonic.

programme.title: Offspring S3 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Patrick confronts Nina about the serve Billie gave him over their breakup and her new relationship with Adam. Will Nina face the boundaries of her relationship?

programme.title: Offspring S3 Ep. 11
programme.desc: The reality of Patrick's departure hits Nina as she walks to work; later at Patrick's farewell, Nina struggles to say a proper goodbye in front of all her workmates.

programme.title: Offspring S3 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Nina takes a test at the hospital; Billie's insecurity about Rosanna intensifies when Mick insists he's still doing the tour with her.

programme.title: Offspring S3 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Nina celebrates her 35th birthday at the hospital where Darcy has recreated Nina's 8 year old dream birthday party! It is sure to be a night full of surprises!

programme.title: Offspring S4 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Nina and Patrick prepare for parenthood as Billie struggles to cope with Nina's pregnancy. Meanwhile, a new arrival sparks interest at the hospital.

programme.title: Offspring S4 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Nina discovers Patrick's mysterious past whilst Billie fights to take over the family business.

programme.title: Offspring S4 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Nina and Patrick try to solve their problems without resorting to sex, at the same time as Nina's forced to tell Patrick the truth about Eloise. Plus, Darcy and Cherie have a big announcement.

programme.title: Offspring S4 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Tension runs high between Nina and Darcy as he prepares for his road trip with Cherie. Also, Jimmy tries to keep it in the family by applying for a job as Billie's real estate underling.

programme.title: Offspring S4 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Nina is confronted by the nature of Eloise's crush. Billie insists she and Mick meet the press as a power couple and Jimmy's inspired by a new business venture. Guest Starring MasterChef's Matt Preston.

programme.title: Offspring S4 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Nina and Patrick deal with a rather difficult house guest as Billie attempts to cover her business woes.

programme.title: Offspring S4 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Nina's best intentions with the Reid family cause several rifts in both the Reid & Proudman families. Meanwhile, Billie struggles to work under a new boss as well as a damaging magazine article.

programme.title: Offspring S4 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Nina wonders if her pregnancy with Patrick is enough to keep them together; Patrick struggles with Kate's decision to see her abusive ex-partner Dean; Billie is confronted by Mick's popularity.

programme.title: Offspring S4 Ep. 9
programme.desc: A dream about Counsellor Lawrence has Nina questioning her relationship with Patrick. Meanwhile, Billie embarks on a new career and heads for self-destruction.

programme.title: Offspring S4 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Nina and Patrick struggle to negotiate the role of the ever present Proudmans in their life together. Meanwhile, Billie is in damage control after her night out on the town.

programme.title: Offspring S4 Ep. 11
programme.desc: The Proudman family implodes when Nina and Patrick's counselling session goes public.

programme.title: Offspring S4 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Billie and Mick's relationship strains under the weight of her infidelity.

programme.title: Offspring S4 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Nina prepares for the biggest day of her life. Meanwhile, Mick goes on a search to bring Billie home.

programme.title: Offspring S5 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Six months after Patrick's death, Nina and Billie are caring for baby Zoe together. Nina is determined to jump back into life and return to work, while Billie counts the days til Mick's return.

programme.title: Offspring S5 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Nina has a blast from the past when she runs into an old flame at the hospital. Billie meets with Lawrence to discuss his feelings. Will sparks fly?

programme.title: What I Lost
programme.desc: When Chris returns for a visit, his reunion takes a shocking turn when his son, Christian, is abducted.

programme.title: You Are Here
programme.desc: Near the end of a shift, 15 Division busts a marijuana grow-op.

programme.title: Deception
programme.desc: When a pedophile is found beaten, Andy discovers Marlo has been conducting an off-hours “investigation."

programme.title: Under Fire
programme.desc: Someone with a grudge against 15 Division opens fire on Andy and Chloe.

programme.title: You Can See the Stars
programme.desc: The officers have to piece together the truth about a past crime in order to find Oliver Shaw.

programme.desc: Andy and Dov pull themselves together at an all-night diner, but are caught off-guard in a diner hold-up.

programme.desc: Oliver gets promoted to Acting Staff Sergeant, and Andy is tasked with training 15 Division’s newest rookie.

programme.title: Heart Breakers, Money Makers

programme.desc: After the discovery of an executed gang leader, 15 Division must find the killer before a gang war breaks out.

programme.desc: When 15 Division goes undercover at a club-land bar, Chris’s erratic behavior make Dov suspicious.

programme.title: Two Truths and a Lie
programme.desc: As the officers try to hunt down the killer of Brian Gowdy – Andy and Sam go on the road for interviews.

programme.desc: Oliver prepares Andy to defend herself at Duncan’s dismissal hearing, now happening two hours from now.

programme.desc: An innocuous call to a middle-class home puts Dov and Chris in the middle of a home invasion investigation.

programme.desc: 15 Division works on a program to help tenants move out of a subsidized-housing complex that’s being torn down

programme.title: Everlasting
programme.desc: The officers work to find a bomber. But after catching him, they realize he has more targets set to explode.

programme.desc: Andy is attacked by an intruder at Traci’s place and the Sex Crimes Unit steps in to take over the case.

programme.title: Perfect Family
programme.desc: Andy debates her future with Sam after learning the heart-breaking news that Marlo is pregnant with his baby.

programme.title: Uprising
programme.desc: A riot breaks out at a women’s prison while Andy, Juliet, Nick, and Gail are there to transfer prisoners.

programme.title: Letting Go
programme.desc: Nick’s estranged older brother emerges with new information on someone from their tragic past.

programme.title: A Real Gentleman
programme.desc: When Traci is a no-show for her first raid, 15 Division fears the gun dealer they’re after has kidnapped her.

programme.title: Home Run
programme.desc: After a baseball game erupts in a drive-by shooting, Gail and her brother search for the shooter.

programme.title: Best Man
programme.desc: Andy and Sam are shocked to learn that Oliver is the prime suspect in IA’s corruption investigation.

programme.title: Integrity Test
programme.desc: Andy, Dov, Gail, and Nick undertake a risky plan to prove that Commissioner Alonso Santana is corrupt.

programme.title: Ninety Degrees
programme.desc: A heat wave hits and Jarvis opens the division to the public as a cooling station.

programme.desc: Now that Sam and Marlo’s baby girl has arrived, it’s clear nothing could have prepared Andy for this moment.

programme.title: 74 Epiphanies
programme.desc: With the 15 Division restructure looming, Andy and Sam’s wedding lets the gang celebrate one last hurrah.

programme.desc: A high-stakes takedown goes awry upon the revelation that rookie cop Andy McNally has busted one of her own.

programme.title: Mercury Retrograde
programme.desc: As the other rookies hunt for an escaped convict, Swarek lets Andy in on his past undercover exploits.

programme.title: Fite Nite
programme.desc: The rookie cops duke it out for a cause at “Fite Nite.”

programme.title: The Silent Partner
programme.desc: Amy finds herself in a difficult position when a client reveals that Peter turned down a lucrative job offer.

programme.desc: When Amy is invited to do a horse clinic in Montana, she and Ty decide to take a road trip together.

programme.title: Cowgirls Don’t Cry

programme.desc: Amy and Ty help Scott’s nephew realize he is worthy of continuing his family tradition of relay racing.

programme.desc: Lou spearheads preparations for the big day while Amy throws herself into gentling a rescue horse.

programme.title: Written in Stone
programme.desc: To give Amy and Ty the wedding they really want, Lou struggles to deal with a slew of last minute hurdles

programme.title: Brave New World

programme.title: Begin Again
programme.desc: Ty prepares to celebrate an important milestone as he and Amy treat an abandoned horse.

programme.title: Riding for a Fall
programme.desc: Georgie gets pulled away by Lou and Peter who insist she focus on her schoolwork.

programme.title: Ties of the Earth
programme.desc: Jack grapples with the impending loss of a loyal and trusted friend.

programme.desc: Georgie guilts Jack into helping her train on a new horse in the hopes he will fall in love with the animal.

programme.desc: Tim seeks Amy and Georgie’s help to discourage Jade from accepting a shady sponsorship deal.

programme.desc: Amy and Cass work together to save a racehorse with a career-ending condition.

programme.desc: While helping Cass handle a spirited horse, Amy learns there is more riding on their success than she realized

programme.desc: When their plans to get away are thwarted, Amy and Ty celebrate their first anniversary closer to home.

programme.desc: As Amy and Ty prepare for parenthood, they work together to resolve a dangerous pregnancy issue.

programme.title: The Commander S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Newly promoted, Commander Clare Blake (Amanda Burton) vows no cover-ups. When a previously convicted killer, James Lampton (Hugh Bonneville), gets released on parole, Blake's judgement is put to the test.

programme.title: The Commander S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: DCI Mike Hedges (Matthew Marsh) conceals evidence of his involvement in the police shooting of an unarmed civilian, Lionel Cripps.

programme.title: The Commander S2 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Commander Blake is in trouble. Her relationship with convicted killer James Lampton made the tabloids, and her supervisors are not amused.

programme.title: The Commander S2 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Commander Blake's terminally ill sister moves in with her while Blake deals with the dangerous computer hacker who has threatened to kill more patients every 24 hours.

programme.title: The Commander S2 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Patient and persistent, Deputy Chief Constable Stephen Blackton (David O'Hara) has earned his nickname, "Blackdog,” as he is called in to re-open the investigation of the Lionel Cripps shooting.

programme.title: The Commander S2 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Graham Warner, the officer implicated in the Lionel Cripps shooting, is found dead in a park. Commander Blake continues to bury evidence of her relationship with James Lampton.

programme.title: The Commander S3 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Graham Warner, the officer implicated in the Lionel Cripps shooting, is found dead in a park. Commander Blake continues to bury evidence of her relationship with James Lampton.

programme.title: The Commander S3 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Dutch DI Count Eric Van Hauten offers to help DCI Hedges with a new murder case. Commander Blake pledges to remain uninvolved, but will she be able to as the threat of more victims increases?

programme.title: The Commander S4 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Commander Blake clashes with the drug squad and the preserved body of a two-year-old child found at an abandoned mental hospital remains a mystery. Blake is accused of having blood on her hands.

programme.title: The Commander S4 Ep. 2

programme.title: Above Suspicion S1 Ep. 1
